_comment_termag_url: ws://localhost:3040/termag/ws/agent for same-host; wss://your-domain/termag/ws/agent for remote (through reverse proxy)
_comment_path_remap: Optional. Rewrite incoming /home/<user>/... paths from the backend. Useful on macOS where home dirs live under /Users/. Example: { "/home/psecor": "/Users/psecor" }
